terminals.name: Mattermost Server
terminals.command: export GOPATH="${GOPATH:-/home/ubuntu/go}" && export PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${GOPATH}/bin:/usr/local/bin:${PATH}" && export MM_NO_DOCKER=true && cd server && make cursor-cloud-run-server-prereqs && air -c ../.cursor/.air.toml
terminals.description: Builds and runs the Mattermost backend server on :8065 with hot-reload via Air. Auto-restarts on Go file changes.

terminals.name: Webapp Dev Server
terminals.description: Webpack dev server with hot module replacement for frontend changes. CSS/JS changes appear instantly without rebuilding.

terminals.name: Server Tests
terminals.description: Terminal for running Go server tests. Use cursor-cloud-test-server for full suite or cursor-cloud-test-server-quick for fast tests.
